unmapped.human_action: Review LITE and COHR options chains to determine whether scanner silence reflects illiquid strike/expiry combinations below filter thresholds or a genuine market blind spot. Identify next LITE and COHR earnings dates as catalyst anchors. Assess sizing relative to open cicadas-theme book before initiating any entry. Operator sign-off required before adding photonic exposure given current book commitment through June 11 ENSO event.
unmapped.legal_disclaimer: For operator review only. Not investment advice. Paper book only; live book not yet unlocked (21 of 30 required closed trades completed). All figures sourced from company IR disclosures and corpus as of stated evidence dates.
unmapped.machine_action: Expand photonic computing scanner sweep to include LITE and COHR with relaxed OI and volume minimums and 60-90 DTE window. Flag any NVIDIA 8-K, 10-Q, or earnings-call language that modifies or restructures the March 2 2026 $4B commitment. Track OCS backlog and hyperscaler optical revenue lines quarterly. Add asymmetry-score alert for AAOI as optics rotation leading indicator.
unmapped.methodology_footer: Corpus claims dated 2026-05-17. Scanner results dated 2026-04-28. Convergence scores from scan-results.json generated 2026-05-26. Book data as of 2026-05-26. Revenue figures from LITE Q3 FY2026 and COHR Q3 FY2026 primary IR. Private valuations from fundraise announcements. AAOI price event sourced from clm_pc_revenue_inflection.
unmapped.position_conflict_disclosure: No open or closed photonic computing positions in paper or live book. Book carries 9 closed CRSP positions (synthetic-biology theme, all expired at 0% P&L in expiry week) and 13 open cicadas-theme positions across FXA, CORN, DBA, and WEAT targeting the June 11 ENSO data release. No overlap with this thesis. Adding photonic exposure before June 11 would be additive risk, not a hedge.
unmapped.uncertainty: The primary uncertainty is whether scanner silence is a data gap (LITE/COHR failing the scanner's OI or bid-ask filters) or a genuine market signal. If the former, the asymmetry gap cannot be calculated and the quiet-setup framing may be an artifact. Revenue inflection is independently confirmed by primary IR, but thesis-implied vs market-implied move ratio remains unknown without qualifying contracts. Private chiplet milestones (Lightmatter, Ayar) are fundraise disclosures; the 12-24 month lead-time hypothesis is directional, not empirically back-tested in this corpus.

original_issue.falsification: NVIDIA, Lumentum, or Coherent publicly reduces or restructures the March 2 2026 $4B commitment in a newsroom release, 8-K, 10-Q, or earnings-call disclosure — this is the single load-bearing demand anchor for the thesis LITE or COHR misses one quarter of hyperscaler optical revenue or OCS backlog conversion by more than 25%, eliminating the revenue-inflection case A non-photonic interconnect alternative — advanced copper, in-package electrical fabric, or hyperscaler-built optical engines — wins material design-in slots at the 2026-2027 OFC equivalent away from LITE, COHR, AAOI, Lightmatter, or Ayar TSMC reports in earnings materials that CoWoS-class advanced-packaging capacity is no longer tight for AI/HPC customers, removing the supply-ramp pricing-power premise for co-packaged optics Scanner coverage gap confirmed: LITE and COHR options chains fail to generate any qualifying contracts even after expanded sweep parameters, indicating the options market is genuinely absent and the thesis must be expressed in equity not derivatives

original_issue.thesis: Silicon photonics is generating the real revenue inflection inside AI infrastructure while options flow concentrates in peak-hype names one layer up the stack. NVIDIA's $4B anchor commitment in March 2026, combined with 90% and 21% year-over-year revenue growth at Lumentum and Coherent respectively, and a validated private chiplet layer (Lightmatter, Ayar Labs, Marvell-Celestial), constitutes the strongest customer-anchored demand signal in any AI hardware subsector. The scanner found zero contracts against the photonic computing theme. LITE carries a convergence score of 0.4 while NVDA sits at 0.8. The market is pricing the AI buildout through the GPU and networking layer and has not yet routed flow into the optics bottleneck beneath it.

Private chiplet milestones (Lightmatter, Ayar) are fundraise disclosures; the 12-24 month lead-time hypothesis is directional, not empirically back-tested in this corpus.

title: The Light Nobody Is Trading
summary: Silicon photonics is generating the real revenue inflection inside AI infrastructure while options flow concentrates in peak-hype names one layer up the stack.

claims.statement: Silicon photonics is generating the real revenue inflection inside AI infrastructure while options flow concentrates in peak-hype names one layer up the stack. NVIDIA's $4B anchor commitment in March 2026, combined with 90% and 21% year-over-year revenue growth at Lumentum and Coherent respectively, and a validated private chiplet layer (Lightmatter, Ayar Labs, Marvell-Celestial), constitutes the strongest customer-anchored demand signal in any AI hardware subsector. The scanner found zero contracts against the photonic computing theme. LITE carries a convergence score of 0.4 while NVDA sits at 0.8. The market is pricing the AI buildout through the GPU and networking layer and has not yet routed flow into the optics bottleneck beneath it.
claims.falsification: NVIDIA, Lumentum, or Coherent publicly reduces or restructures the March 2 2026 $4B commitment in a newsroom release, 8-K, 10-Q, or earnings-call disclosure — this is the single load-bearing demand anchor for the thesis LITE or COHR misses one quarter of hyperscaler optical revenue or OCS backlog conversion by more than 25%, eliminating the revenue-inflection case A non-photonic interconnect alternative — advanced copper, in-package electrical fabric, or hyperscaler-built optical engines — wins material design-in slots at the 2026-2027 OFC equivalent away from LITE, COHR, AAOI, Lightmatter, or Ayar TSMC reports in earnings materials that CoWoS-class advanced-packaging capacity is no longer tight for AI/HPC customers, removing the supply-ramp pricing-power premise for co-packaged optics Scanner coverage gap confirmed: LITE and COHR options chains fail to generate any qualifying contracts even after expanded sweep parameters, indicating the options market is genuinely absent and the thesis must be expressed in equity not derivatives

render.heading: Thesis
render.body: Silicon photonics is generating the real revenue inflection inside AI infrastructure while options flow concentrates in peak-hype names one layer up the stack. NVIDIA's $4B anchor commitment in March 2026, combined with 90% and 21% year-over-year revenue growth at Lumentum and Coherent respectively, and a validated private chiplet layer (Lightmatter, Ayar Labs, Marvell-Celestial), constitutes the strongest customer-anchored demand signal in any AI hardware subsector. The scanner found zero contracts against the photonic computing theme. LITE carries a convergence score of 0.4 while NVDA sits at 0.8. The market is pricing the AI buildout through the GPU and networking layer and has not yet routed flow into the optics bottleneck beneath it.
